{{Infobox character
| name = Crusher
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|conceptual strength}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood Shadow]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, enhanced Shadow}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|depths of Yan Shoumei's soul}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Crusher Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Crusher is a powerful entity residing within the soul of [[Yan Shoumei]]. Appearing as a massive, muscular being with features reminiscent of a gorilla or bear, he possesses a wolf-like snout and rabbit-like ears. His physical stature is more than twice the height of [[Shoumei]], and he manifests with a roar. Rather than possessing memories, Crusher is driven by the primal instincts of a predator. His composition involves more than standard [[madra]], as he incorporates stolen willpower, elements from twelve unique [[sacred beasts]], and a small portion of the [[Strength Icon]]. In combat, Crusher exerts an overwhelming level of physical power that functions on a conceptual scale, allowing him to manipulate the laws of the physical world similarly to [[Heralds]] or [[Monarchs]]. This strength is far greater than what was initially anticipated by [[Shoumei]] and her companions. During battle, he has engaged Archlords and dolphin-spirits, though he can be injured, having previously suffered near-destruction at the hands of [[Lindon Arelius]]. After being damaged, he can collapse into a red stream to return to [[Shoumei]]. He serves as a significant force in her arsenal, though his full potential was limited because he was not permitted to advance naturally.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Crusher is a snarling monster of blood and the [[Blood Shadow]] belonging to [[Yan Shoumei]], though she did not summon this entity. As a [[Blood Shadow]] with power exceeding that of an [[Underlord]], the beast possesses incredible dexterity and leg strength. This strength operates on a conceptual level, allowing Crusher to bend the physical rules of the world much like a [[Monarch]] or [[Herald]]. During combat, the creature proved itself a formidable beast capable of striking [[Yerin]] and tossing [[Ruby]] aside.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] is a [[Blood Shadow]] with power beyond an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] possesses incredible leg strength and dexterity but lacks a spatial artifact or [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]]'s strength is so great that it works on a conceptual level.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]]'s strength can bend the rules of the physical world like [[Heralds]] or [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] is the name of [[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] is a beast capable of striking [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] tossed [[Ruby]] aside.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] did not summon [[Crusher]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]] is a snarling monster of blood.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Crusher]] made a donation that [[Lindon]] used to match [[Yerin]]'s strength.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] had once felt a weight of conceptual strength like [[Crusher]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] gained strength from draining [[Crusher]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Crusher]] is an enhanced [[Shadow]] belonging to [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Residing within the depths of [[Yan Shoumei]]'s soul, Crusher is a [[Blood Shadow]] and an old friend to the purple spirit. This entity serves as a companion to [[Yan Shoumei]], acting as someone she can rely upon to undertake various risks. Crusher is composed of more than mere [[madra]], as the being carries stolen willpower and the collective weight of a dozen unique [[sacred beasts]]. Additionally, Crusher possesses a sliver of the [[Strength Icon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is someone [[Yan Shoumei]] relies on to take risks.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is a companion of [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is composed of more than just [[madra]], carrying stolen willpower and the weight of a dozen unique [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] carries a sliver of the [[Strength Icon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] is an old friend of the purple spirit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] resides in the depths of [[Yan Shoumei]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
